2025-26 Saint Louis Billikens Men's Roster and Stats

Previous Season

Record: 29-6 (15-3, 1st in A-10 MBB)

Coach: Josh Schertz

PS/G: 87.2 (10th of 365)

PA/G: 70.5 (80th of 365)

SRS: 17.64 (31st of 365)

SOS: 2.75 (107th of 365)

ORtg: 120.8 (15th of 365)

DRtg: 97.6 (18th of 365)

Preseason Odds: Championship +30000

NCAA Tournament: (#9 seed in Midwest)
Won Midwest First Round (102-77) versus #8 Georgia
Lost Midwest Second Round (95-72) versus #1 Michigan

  • A-10 Reg Season Champ
